codeReview.summary: Complete and well-implemented feature. Created worker and checker skill files with appropriate protocols, added loadSkillFile function with proper repo/state-dir resolution and fallback logic, updated CompileWorkerBriefing to embed skill content based on work kind, and added comprehensive tests covering all scenarios. All verification commands passed (go build, go test, go vet). Code is clean, follows Go idioms, and integrates smoothly with existing patterns.

summary: Feature skill-based-contracts PASSED review. Implementation fully satisfies all requirements: both skill files exist with proper protocols (worker protocol with peer channel self-check, checker protocol with verification steps), loadSkillFile correctly resolves from multiple roots with fallback content, CompileWorkerBriefing selects and embeds the appropriate skill based on work kind (worker vs checker), RenderWorkerBriefingMarkdown includes the skill markdown, and comprehensive tests cover repo-present and fallback scenarios plus briefing rendering for both work kinds. All validators passed (go build 0, go test 0, go vet 0). No issues found. Worker followed skill procedure perfectly with no deviations. No shared state gaps detected.
